arts.ttl: Arsenal 'to battle' Man United for Sporting Lisbon star who has thrived under Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly preparing to battle Manchester United for Ousmane Diomande's signature during next summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Man United, Arsenal 'suffer setback' in pursuit of Sporting Lisbon wonderkid
arts.sum: Sporting Lisbon's Geovany Quenda is reportedly expected to remain with his Portuguese club for at least one more season amid interest from Manchester United and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea scouting €25-30m-rated Frenchman
arts.sum: LOSC Lille midfielder Ayyoub Bouaddi is attracting interest from clubs like AC Milan, Juventus, Arsenal, Liverpool, and Chelsea. Scouts from these European clubs have watched Bouaddi in action against Juventus and Lyon, sources have informed CaughtOffside. The 17-year-old central midfielder is highly rated across Europe and his performances in the matches against Juventus and Leon have […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea scouting €25-30m-rated Frenchman appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 3 key battles that could decide heavyweight Chelsea vs Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Three key battles which could decide the outcome of the Premier League clash between Chelsea and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea knew they needed 'urgent' upgrade on Raheem Sterling after one game during pre-season
Arsenal enter race for Nigerian sensation
arts.sum: Arsenal have entered the race for Atalanta and Nigeria sensation Ademola Lookman, according to Soccernet.ng. Lookman, now 27, is still expected to leave Atalanta at the end of the season for a big club.

arts.ttl: Man United 'want next Martin Odegaard' as Ruben Amorim 'gives green light' to move for teenage sensation
arts.sum: Incoming Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim is reportedly desperate for his new club to win the race for Rosenborg teenager Sverre Nypan.

arts.ttl: When is Chelsea vs Arsenal? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: In their last league game, Arsenal took on Newcastle United at St. James’ Park. In their most recent Premier League game, Chelsea faced Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Chelsea full squad for Arsenal as crucial Cole Palmer injury decision made
arts.sum: Palmer, who has contributed to more goals than any other player in the league this season prior to the weekend's action, is a serious fitness doubt for Chelsea . Unless there have been late injuries picked up, there will be a familiar and strong feeling to the names Maresca does select.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Arsenal: Why Maresca opts for Caicedo over £100m problem Enzo Fernandez
arts.sum: "It is a very proud moment for us. This will be one of the biggest football events Armenia has ever had." The local sentiment ahead of FC Noah’s trip to Stamford Bridge dripped with anticipation...
